title: Mark’s New Label Apologizes For His Confederate Flag T-Shirt
content:
Former NCT member Mark’s new label has apologized after posting photos of the singer wearing a T-shirt emblazoned with the Confederate flag. On June 23, Mark came under fire when his newly established label Upper Room posted photos of him wearing a T-shirt with the Confederate flag on it. Shortly afterwards, Upper Room took to… Continue reading Mark’s New Label Apologizes For His Confederate Flag T-Shirt
The post Mark’s New Label Apologizes For His Confederate Flag T-Shirt appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: Mark新公司因他穿邦联旗T恤道歉
facts_list: 6月23日，前NCT成员Mark新成立的厂牌Upper Room发布了他身穿印有邦联旗图案T恤的照片
Upper Room随后就此事道歉
summary_zh: 前NCT成员Mark的新厂牌Upper Room因发布他身穿邦联旗T恤的照片而引发争议，随后公开道歉。邦联旗在美国被视为种族主义象征。

该剧讲述一个从出生就被打上“毁掉家庭”烙印的孩子，以及一位女性对抗社会偏见和残酷命运、重获新生的故事

title: Variety Show “Happy Together” Announces Return With Yu Jae Seok, Jang Hang Jun, And Yoon Jong Shin
content:
KBS2’s beloved variety show “Happy Together” is making its long-awaited return! On June 23, KBS unveiled three new posters showcasing the chemistry between the show’s hosts and officially announced the premiere date for its upcoming reboot. Returning under the title “Happy Together: Glad We’re Not Alone” (literal title), the program will be reimagined as a… Continue reading Variety Show “Happy Together” Announces Return With Yu Jae Seok, Jang Hang Jun, And Yoon Jong Shin
The post Variety Show “Happy Together” Announces Return With Yu Jae Seok, Jang Hang Jun, And Yoon Jong Shin appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: KBS2《Happy Together》重启，刘在石、张恒俊、尹钟信加盟
facts_list: KBS2于6月23日公开三张新海报，展示主持人之间的化学反应
节目更名为《Happy Together: Glad We're Not Alone》（暂译）
主持人阵容包括刘在石、张恒俊、尹钟信
官方宣布了重启版的播出日期
summary_zh: KBS2人气综艺《Happy Together》宣布重启，更名为《Happy Together: Glad We're Not Alone》（暂译），由刘在石、张恒俊、尹钟信担任主持人。KBS于6月23日公开三张新海报，并正式宣布了首播日期。

content:

title: JTBC Responds To Reports About Variety Shows Amid Corporate Rehabilitation Process
content:
JTBC has denied reports of halting filming for variety shows amid corporate rehabilitation proceedings. Previously on June 12, JTBC declared a default after failing to repay 20.6 billion won (approximately $15 million) in securitized loans by their maturity date. It was later revealed that JoongAng Holdings, Contentree JoongAng, Megabox JoongAng, and JoongAng P&I filed for… Continue reading JTBC Responds To Reports About Variety Shows Amid Corporate Rehabilitation Process
The post JTBC Responds To Reports About Variety Shows Amid Corporate Rehabilitation Process appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: JTBC否认企业重整期间停拍综艺传闻
facts_list: JTBC否认因企业重整程序而停拍综艺节目的报道
6月12日，JTBC因未能偿还206亿韩元（约1500万美元）证券化贷款而宣布违约
JoongAng Holdings、Contentree JoongAng、Megabox JoongAng及JoongAng P&I已申请企业重整
summary_zh: JTBC否认了关于企业重整期间停拍综艺节目的报道。此前6月12日，JTBC因未能偿还206亿韩元（约1500万美元）证券化贷款而宣布违约。随后，JoongAng Holdings、Contentree JoongAng、Megabox JoongAng及JoongAng P&I申请了企业重整。

暂停拍摄的原因包括当前正值雨季，计划在雨季结束后恢复拍摄。

title_zh: K-pop旅行综艺《All Or Nothing》确定出演阵容及播出日程
facts_list: 节目《All Or Nothing》是一档在埃及拍摄的旅行生存类综艺，由《惊人的星期六》《惠美李艺彩派》《Idol Salon》的李泰京导演执导
节目已确认出演阵容，但具体名单未在原文中公布
节目播出日程已确定，但具体日期未在原文中说明
summary_zh: K-pop旅行生存综艺《All Or Nothing》确认了出演阵容和播出日程。该节目由李泰京导演执导，在充满历史与神秘感的埃及拍摄，是一档赢家通吃的旅行系列节目。具体阵容和播出时间尚未公开。

title: Nam Joo Hyuk, Roh Yoon Seo, And Cho Seung Woo Navigate Mysterious A Curse In New Drama “The East Palace”
content:

title_zh: 南柱赫、卢允瑞、赵成夏新剧《东宫》公开剧照，三人共探神秘诅咒
facts_list: Netflix新剧《东宫》公开新剧照，主演南柱赫、卢允瑞、赵成夏亮相
南柱赫饰演能穿越鬼魂世界的具天，卢允瑞饰演能听见鬼魂声音的宫女生江，赵成夏饰演国王
summary_zh: Netflix新剧《东宫》公开新剧照，主演南柱赫、卢允瑞、赵成夏亮相。该剧讲述能穿越鬼魂世界的具天（南柱赫饰）与能听见鬼魂声音的宫女生江（卢允瑞饰）被国王（赵成夏饰）召唤，共同应对神秘诅咒的故事。

title: ARrC Announces Disbandment
content:
ARrC will be concluding their promotions as a group. On June 23, ARrC’s agency MYSTIC STORY released an official notice announcing the conclusion of ARrC’s group activities as of June 23, 2026. Read the notice below: Following the announcement, the members also wrote heartfelt letters to fans. Check out the letters below: ARrC is a… Continue reading ARrC Announces Disbandment
The post ARrC Announces Disbandment appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: ARrC宣布解散，6月23日起终止团体活动
facts_list: 2026年6月23日，ARrC所属社MYSTIC STORY发布官方公告，宣布ARrC于当日终止团体活动
成员随后向粉丝写了亲笔信
summary_zh: 2026年6月23日，韩国组合ARrC的所属社MYSTIC STORY发布官方公告，宣布ARrC于当日终止团体活动。此后，成员们也向粉丝写了亲笔信。

title_zh: 河锡辰与哈尼新剧《爱情菜单》海报公开，传递孤独感
facts_list: 新剧《爱情菜单》公开河锡辰与哈尼的角色海报
剧情讲述分手八年的恋人重逢，重建破碎家庭的故事
summary_zh: 即将播出的韩剧《爱情菜单》公开了河锡辰与哈尼的新角色海报。该剧是一部家庭浪漫剧，讲述一对分手八年的恋人重逢后，拼凑破碎家庭碎片，共同创造温暖生活餐桌的故事。

title_zh: 姜泰伍与元真儿确定担任2026年KM Chart Awards主持人
facts_list: 2023年6月23日，2026年KM Chart Awards主办方正式宣布演员姜泰伍和元真儿被选为该颁奖礼的主持人。
summary_zh: 2026年KM Chart Awards（KMA）主办方于6月23日宣布，演员姜泰伍和元真儿将担任该颁奖礼的主持人。

title: Watch: ENHYPEN Teases Brand Renewal With Mood Teaser

title_zh: 黄寅烨与惠利新剧《Dream To You》海报公开，深情拥抱引期待
facts_list: ENA新剧《Dream To You》公开新海报
该剧为浪漫喜剧，讲述天才导演禹秀彬（黄寅烨饰）与记者朱伊在（惠利饰）重逢的故事
海报中两人深情拥抱
summary_zh: ENA新剧《Dream To You》公开新海报，该剧为浪漫喜剧，讲述天才导演禹秀彬（黄寅烨饰）实现梦想后归来，与忘记梦想的记者朱伊在（惠利饰）重逢的故事。海报中两人深情拥抱，引发期待。

title: “See You At Work Tomorrow!” Premieres To No. 1 Ratings
content:
tvN’s new Monday-Tuesday drama “See You at Work Tomorrow!” has premiered! On June 22, the new rom-com drama “See You at Work Tomorrow!” starring Seo In Guk and Park Ji Hyun premiered to No. 1 in ratings with an average nationwide viewership rating of 4.8 percent. Meanwhile, ENA’s “Doctor on the Edge” kicked off its… Continue reading “See You At Work Tomorrow!” Premieres To No. 1 Ratings

title_zh: 《明天见！》首播收视夺冠，全国平均4.8%
facts_list: tvN新月火剧《明天见！》于6月22日首播
该剧由徐仁国和朴智贤主演
首播全国平均收视率为4.8%，位居同时段第一
summary_zh: tvN新月火剧《明天见！》于6月22日首播，由徐仁国和朴智贤主演，首播全国平均收视率为4.8%，位居同时段第一。

title: BTS’s “I NEED U” (Original Ver.) MV Surpasses 200 Million Views
content:
Another BTS music video has reached 200 million views! The group’s “I NEED U” (Original ver.) music video surpassed 200 million views n June 23 at approximately 2:50 a.m. KST, which is about 11 years, one month, and 12 days since its release on May 11, 2025 at 12 a.m. KST. Congratulations to BTS! Watch… Continue reading BTS’s “I NEED U” (Original Ver.) MV Surpasses 200 Million Views
The post BTS’s “I NEED U” (Original Ver.) MV Surpasses 200 Million Views appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: BTS《I NEED U》原版MV播放量突破2亿次
facts_list: BTS《I NEED U》原版MV于2025年5月11日0时KST发布
该MV于2025年6月23日约2:50 KST突破2亿次播放，历时约11年1个月12天
summary_zh: BTS《I NEED U》原版MV在发布约11年1个月12天后，于2025年6月23日约2:50 KST突破2亿次播放量。
